title: Sour Bike Frame Wall Mount Display
content:
Sour wants you to stop hiding your frames. Put them on the wall where they belong. The Sour Frame Wall Mount turns your bike frame into a statement piece. Too broke to build it up yet? It’s cheaper to buy a 55,00 € wall mount! ;-)

Designed for those who see bikes as more than machines, this mount lets you showcase your build like the object of obsession it is. 3D printed from durable ABS and finished with a new CNC’d top cap, it blends seamlessly into any space while letting your frame do the talking. No distractions. No compromises. Just your bike, elevated.

Built to fit standard bottom bracket interfaces like BSA and T47, it holds your frame securely while keeping the aesthetic razor-sharp. Whether it’s your living room, workshop, or studio — this is where your bike earns its place off the road.

Specs:

  • NEW! 3D printed ABS bicycle frame wall mount + AL7075 CNC`d Cover to display your favorite old school (or new school) frame
  • Made in Germany
  • Designed to be used on dry walls, wood walls, etc
  • All black all day long
  • Weight – does it matter? (excluding bolts, etc.)
  • Works with 68/73 BSA, 68/73 T47 bottom bracket shells
  • The Cap is manufactured, anodized, and lasered by Qvist

Check out more at Sour.

The post Sour Bike Frame Wall Mount Display appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
